description: §22.4.2 E-META-003 — `reflect()` called on an unknown type. `reflect(NoSuchType)` where `NoSuchType` matches no declared type is a compile error (§22.4.2: `reflect(unknownLiteral)` SHALL be E-META-003). E-META-003 is the diagnostic of record; incidental meta-eval codes (E-META-EVAL-001 / E-SCOPE-001 from the unresolved identifier) are ignored by superset matching.
